395.reason: [This method is empty and does not handle the error for single '&' or '|' characters. According to the problem requirements, when a single '&' or '|' is encountered (not part of '&&' or '||'), it should generate an error with category code 'a'. The current implementation creates a token with type AND/OR but doesn't record any error information that can be propagated to the output.]
